tracks.meaning: a sequence of instructions that repeats until a condition is met or a specified number of iterations is completed
to move in a circular or oval path that returns to the starting point
a circular or oval shaped anatomical structure or opening in the body
a curved or circular band of material used as a fastener or structural element
a complete circular path or trajectory that comes back to its origin
a closed circuit or continuous electronic pathway
a state of repeating the same activity, thought, or behavior without progress or change
a circular or enclosed area defined by boundaries or jurisdiction
a return message or response that follows from a previous message in a sequence
a section of theatrical staging with defined boundaries or an enclosed playing area
one complete circuit of a track or course in a race or athletic event
a repetitive pattern of thoughts, behaviors, or emotional states that recurs without resolution
